narration: Insertion sort treats the left side as already sorted.
callout: The current value is the new card we want to insert.

narration: If the current value is smaller than values on the left, those bigger values slide right.
decision: Now 3 has been inserted into the correct place.

predictionPrompt.prompt: What stays sorted during insertion sort?

choices.label: The left side up to the current position
choices.feedback: Correct. Each step keeps that left section in order.

choices.label: Only the far right side
choices.feedback: Not this one. The sorted part grows from the left.

narration: Each new value slides into place just like sorting cards in your hand.
callout: That is why insertion sort feels natural to many beginners.
